parameters.query:
SELECT pp.*,
  COUNT(pe.id)::integer                AS entries_count,
  COALESCE(SUM(pe.gross_salary),0)     AS total_gross,
  COALESCE(SUM(pe.net_salary),0)       AS total_net,
  COALESCE(SUM(pe.total_employer_cost),0) AS total_employer_cost
FROM payroll_periods pp
LEFT JOIN payroll_entries pe ON pe.payroll_period_id = pp.id
WHERE ($1::integer IS NULL OR pp.period_year = $1::integer)
  AND ($2::text IS NULL OR pp.status::text = $2)
  AND ($3::integer IS NULL OR pp.clinic_id = $3::integer)
GROUP BY pp.id
ORDER BY pp.period_year DESC, pp.period_month DESC

SELECT pp.*,
  COUNT(pe.id)::integer                   AS entries_count,
  COALESCE(SUM(pe.gross_salary),0)        AS total_gross,
  COALESCE(SUM(pe.net_salary),0)          AS total_net,
  COALESCE(SUM(pe.total_employer_cost),0) AS total_employer_cost
FROM payroll_periods pp
LEFT JOIN payroll_entries pe ON pe.payroll_period_id = pp.id
WHERE pp.id = $1::uuid
GROUP BY pp.id

INSERT INTO payroll_periods (clinic_id, period_year, period_month, status, notes, created_by)
VALUES ($1::integer, $2::integer, $3::integer, 'draft', NULLIF($4,''), NULLIF($5,'')::uuid)
ON CONFLICT (clinic_id, period_year, period_month) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, period_year, period_month, status

SELECT
  p.id AS period_id, p.period_year, p.period_month, p.clinic_id, p.status,
  (p.period_year || '-' || LPAD(p.period_month::text,2,'0') || '-01')::date AS period_start,
  (DATE_TRUNC('month', (p.period_year || '-' || LPAD(p.period_month::text,2,'0') || '-01')::date) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::date AS period_end,
  (
    SELECT jsonb_object_agg(setting_key, setting_value)
    FROM payroll_settings
  ) AS settings
FROM payroll_periods p
WHERE p.id = $1::uuid

SELECT
  dc.*,
  u.name AS doctor_name
FROM doctor_contracts dc
JOIN users u ON dc.doctor_id = u.id
WHERE dc.is_active = true
  AND dc.valid_from <= $2::date
  AND (dc.valid_until IS NULL OR dc.valid_until >= $1::date)
  AND (dc.clinic_id IS NULL OR dc.clinic_id = $3::integer)

additionalFields.queryParams: ={{ [$('Fetch Period + Settings').item.json.period_start, $('Fetch Period + Settings').item.json.period_end, $('Fetch Period + Settings').item.json.clinic_id] }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  ps.doctor_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ps.sesion_id)::integer                        AS sessions_count,
  COALESCE(SUM(DISTINCT a.duration_minutes),0) / 60.0          AS hours_worked,
  COALESCE(SUM(DISTINCT svc.price), 0)                         AS revenue_listed,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT SUM(pay.amount_applied)
    FROM payments pay
    JOIN quotes q ON q.id = pay.quote_id
    WHERE q.doctor_id = ps.doctor_id
      AND pay.payment_date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  ), 0)                                                         AS revenue_billed
FROM patient_sessions ps
LEFT JOIN appointments a ON a.id = ps.appointment_id
LEFT JOIN services svc ON svc.id = ANY(
  SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(a.services)::uuid
)
WHERE ps.fecha_sesion BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND ps.doctor_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ps.doctor_id

INSERT INTO payroll_entries
  (payroll_period_id, doctor_id, doctor_contract_id, clinic_id,
   sessions_count, hours_worked, services_revenue_billed, services_revenue_listed,
   base_amount, variable_amount, gross_salary,
   bps_employee, fonasa_employee, irpf_withholding, other_deductions, total_deductions,
   net_salary, bps_employer, fonasa_employer,
   aguinaldo_provision, vacation_provision, total_employer_cost,
   currency, status, calculated_at)
VALUES
  ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, $3::uuid, $4::integer,
   $5::integer, $6::decimal, $7::decimal, $8::decimal,
   $9::decimal, $10::decimal, $11::decimal,
   $12::decimal, $13::decimal, $14::decimal, $15::decimal, $16::decimal,
   $17::decimal, $18::decimal, $19::decimal,
   $20::decimal, $21::decimal, $22::decimal,
   $23::currency_enum, 'draft', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (payroll_period_id, doctor_id) DO UPDATE SET
  sessions_count          = EXCLUDED.sessions_count,
  hours_worked            = EXCLUDED.hours_worked,
  services_revenue_billed = EXCLUDED.services_revenue_billed,
  services_revenue_listed = EXCLUDED.services_revenue_listed,
  base_amount             = EXCLUDED.base_amount,
  variable_amount         = EXCLUDED.variable_amount,
  gross_salary            = EXCLUDED.gross_salary,
  bps_employee            = EXCLUDED.bps_employee,
  fonasa_employee         = EXCLUDED.fonasa_employee,
  irpf_withholding        = EXCLUDED.irpf_withholding,
  other_deductions        = EXCLUDED.other_deductions,
  total_deductions        = EXCLUDED.total_deductions,
  net_salary              = EXCLUDED.net_salary,
  bps_employer            = EXCLUDED.bps_employer,
  fonasa_employer         = EXCLUDED.fonasa_employer,
  aguinaldo_provision     = EXCLUDED.aguinaldo_provision,
  vacation_provision      = EXCLUDED.vacation_provision,
  total_employer_cost     = EXCLUDED.total_employer_cost,
  currency                = EXCLUDED.currency,
  calculated_at           = NOW()
RETURNING id, doctor_id, gross_salary, net_salary

UPDATE payroll_periods SET
  status       = 'calculated',
  generated_at = NOW(),
  generated_by = NULLIF($2,'')::uuid
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING id, status, generated_at

UPDATE payroll_periods
SET status = 'approved', approved_at = NOW(), approved_by = NULLIF($2,'')::uuid
WHERE id = $1::uuid AND status = 'calculated'
RETURNING id, status, approved_at

UPDATE payroll_periods
SET status = 'paid', paid_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1::uuid AND status = 'approved'
RETURNING id, status, paid_at
UPDATE payroll_periods SET status = 'closed' WHERE id = $1::uuid AND status IN ('paid','approved') RETURNING id, status
UPDATE payroll_periods SET status = 'calculated' WHERE id = $1::uuid AND status = 'closed' RETURNING id, status
